analysis.reasoning: Core message: A diplomatic welcome to the Dominican Republic’s new UN Permanent Representative, expressing that China values bilateral ties and cooperation in the UN Security Council and looks forward to strengthening cooperation. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes, the tweet emphasizes cooperation, multilateral engagement at the UN/SC, and constructive bilateral relations—hallmarks of portraying China as cooperative and supportive in international affairs. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is international cooperation. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about domestic achievements or leadership successes. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
